subject: Armored dark warrior in a dynamic combat stance, wielding twin weapons trailing glowing energy arcs crossing in an X pattern
description: A heavily armored humanoid figure crouches in an aggressive fighting stance on a stone floor, twin weapon shafts extended outward as wide sweeping energy arcs cross between them in a glowing red-orange X. The figure wears segmented dark armor and a face-obscuring mask with short white hair visible above it. The background is cold blue with atmospheric fog and the suggestion of stone pillars or architecture behind. The overall rendering is CG-photorealistic consistent with Final Fantasy XI's in-game aesthetic. Energy and motion dominate the composition.
foreground: Armored warrior crouching with twin weapons extended, energy arcs forming an X
background: Stone arena floor, blue atmospheric haze, architectural pillars
emotion: aggressive focus, wide combat crouch signals readiness to strike
